header.poen_objasnjenje: A record of your contribution to the community — like an entry in a ledger, not money. Cannot be bought, cannot be exchanged for cash, and has no value outside the system.

push.nepodrzano: This browser does not support device notifications.
push.blokirano: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.

bagovi.uvod: A list of all reported issues (bugs) on the platform and whether they are being worked on. If you run into a problem, report it here.
bagovi.placeholder_opis: Describe what happens, on which page, and how to reproduce it.
bagovi.validacija: The title needs at least 3 and the description at least 10 characters.
bagovi.poslato: Thanks! Your report has been recorded.

login.nalog_kreiran: Account created. Sign in to continue — someone who knows you verifies you, or you can introduce yourself to the network.
login.greska_registruj_cta: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.greska_prijava: Sign in error. Please try again.

zaboravljenaLozinka.podnaslov: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
zaboravljenaLozinka.poslato_poruka: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent to your address.
zaboravljenaLozinka.poslato_napomena: Check your Spam/Junk folder. The link is valid for 1 hour.
zaboravljenaLozinka.greska_zahtev: Error sending request. Please try again.

resetLozinka.podnaslov: Set a new password for your account.
resetLozinka.link_nevazeci: The link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.
resetLozinka.greska_lozinka_kratka: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetLozinka.greska_zahtev: Error changing password. Please try again.

registracija.mesto_opis: Helps you see listings nearby. You can skip and add it later.
registracija.pseudonim_slobodan_opis: Publicly visible, doesn't show real name
registracija.greska_pseudonim_duljina: Pseudonym must be at least 3 characters.
registracija.greska_lozinka_duljina: Password must be at least 8 characters.
registracija.greska_uslovi: You must accept the terms and privacy policy.

sistem.zahtev_na_cekanju_opis: Documentation received and awaiting admin review (1–3 business days).
sistem.nalog_nije_verifikovan_opis: Verify your identity and receive {iznos} bonus.
sistem.clanovi_pregled_blokiran: Member list is available to verified members.
sistem.krugovi_pregled_blokiran: Circle list is available to verified members.
sistem.nema_krugova: No active Circles in the network. Be the first — found a Circle!
sistem.programi_opis: KOLO Protocol programs — emission for social purposes
sistem.opis_stranice: An overview of the entire KOLO system in numbers — how many members, how much is exchanged, and whether everything is in balance. Track the community's health here; nothing is changed from here, only observed.
sistem.faza_sistema_opis: When the community records 1,000,000 POEN in contributions, the system automatically transitions to Phase 2, activating the Upper Circle (collective decision-making) and ZRNO enrollment.
sistem.kartica_opticaj_opis: The total number of POEN currently in the system. Shows how active the community is.
sistem.mreza_poverenja_opis: The total number of links in the vouching chain (proof of personhood) — how many times one member has vouched for another. Shows how the trust network has grown.
sistem.kartica_racun_fondacije_opis: The Foundation's balance in dinars (inflow from donations and sponsorship, minus expenses). This is not POEN — it is actual funds in dinars.
sistem.fondacija_nema_tx: No recorded transactions on the Foundation's account.
sistem.rast_opticaja_objasnjenje: When the community records 1,000,000 POEN in contributions, the system transitions to Phase 2, activating the Upper Circle (collective decision-making). This is not a price target — POEN has no price or value outside the system.
sistem.zero_sum_ok_opis: Balance check: the sum of all ledger entries is exactly zero. This means no POEN was created out of thin air — everything is recorded correctly.
sistem.donacije_pregled_blokiran: The donations view is available to verified members only.

novcanik.skener_opis: Scan the recipient's QR code to record POEN to them.
novcanik.skener_uputstvo: Point the camera at the QR code of the person you are paying.
novcanik.skener_greska_qr: Invalid QR code. Scan a KOLO QR for receiving POEN.
novcanik.send_greska_iznos: Amount must be a positive integer.
novcanik.qr_opis: Show this code to receive POEN. Scan with phone.
novcanik.opis_stranice: Your POEN ledger — how much has been recorded for you and what has happened. POEN records your contribution; it is not money and cannot be exchanged for dinars. From here you can record POEN for another member.
novcanik.prazno_naslov: You don't have any POEN recorded yet.
novcanik.prazno_opis: POEN is recorded through community participation — through verification, exchanging goods and services, or making contributions. Start by getting verified.

verifikacija.podnaslov: By verifying you gain access to the full system and a bonus of {iznos}.
verifikacija.odbijen_ispravite: Fix the listed problem and resubmit.
verifikacija.foto_napomena: JPG, PNG or WebP. Maximum 5MB per photo.
verifikacija.page_opis: Here the network confirms you as a real person — through someone who knows you personally, without any documents. This unlocks your full access to KOLO.
verifikacija.podnaslov_neverifikovan: Show your code to someone who can verify you.
verifikacija.tabla_neverifikovan_opis: Introduce yourself to the network on the guarantee board — someone there can meet you and confirm you.
verifikacija.tabla_verifikovan_opis: Help new users — see who is requesting verification.
verifikacija.prijava_link: Something wrong with your verification? Report it.
verifikacija.prijava_placeholder: Briefly describe what's wrong (e.g. you don't know the person who verified you).
verifikacija.prijava_poslata: Report sent. Oversight will review it.

krug.clan_krugovi_naslov: You are a member of a Circle
krug.osnivanje_na_cekanju: Circle founding request is pending. The Board is reviewing the request.
krug.pristupnica_poslata: Membership application sent! Please wait for approval.
krug.istupi_potvrda: Are you sure you want to leave this Circle?
krug.projekat_naziv_greska: Name must be at least 3 characters.
krug.osnivanje_info_mid: (you + 4 founders). The Board approves the founding. Upon approval the Circle receives
krug.lokacija_hint_pre: You can set your default location in your
krug.naziv_auto_generisan: The name was auto-generated from the registered seat.
krug.opis_placeholder: Brief description of the Circle's goals and activities...

profil.foto_napomena: JPG, PNG, WebP — cropped to a circle
profil.pseudonim_30_dana: You can change your pseudonym once every 30 days.
profil.lz_greska_duljina: Password must be at least 8 characters.
profil.crop_opis: Move the circle and adjust zoom to select the frame
profil.vidljivost_opis: Fill in your details and use the switch at the end of each field to choose whether it is visible to others on your public profile.
profil.eksport_opis: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format (Art. 36 of the Personal Data Protection Act).
profil.prigovor_opis: If you believe a system decision (verification, suspension, program enrollment) was made in error, you may submit an appeal. We will respond within 30 days.
profil.prigovor_opis_min10: Description must be at least 10 characters.
profil.prigovor_uspeh: Your appeal has been received. We will respond within 30 days.
profil.brisi_opis: Deleting your account anonymizes all your personal data (email, name, phone, location, avatar). Transaction history is retained under an anonymized pseudonym. You may transfer your POEN to another user or it will be returned to the Protocol. ZRNO is automatically deregistered. This action is irreversible.
profil.brisi_primalac_label: Pseudonym of the user to receive your POEN
profil.brisi_primalac_napomena: optional — leave blank to return to Protocol
profil.pristup_samo_verifikovani: Profiles can only be viewed by verified users.
profil.nema_oglasa_jos: You don't have any listings yet.

zrno.trziste_neaktivno: ZRNO market is not yet active. Activates when the Protocol reaches −1,000,000 POEN.
zrno.promena_napomena: Request is executed at midnight (1 day waiting period).
zrno.upis_napomena: Request executed at midnight. Min balance: 10,000 POEN.
zrno.otpis_napomena: Only free ZRNO. Request executed at midnight.
zrno.delegacija_opis: Votes are delegated (not ZRNO). Your voting power ({moc} votes) is transferred to the delegate. Change takes effect at midnight.
zrno.opis: ZRNO records your position in the community and from it derives your vote in decision-making. Here you subscribe and redeem ZRNO and manage your vote.
zrno.zakazan_opoziv: Revocation scheduled — takes effect at midnight

programi.nije_verifikovan: Verification required to apply for programs.
programi.prag_protokol: Protocol reaches threshold of 1M POEN circulation
programi.skolovanje_info: Program activated by Board decision — follow voting at /glasanje
programi.posebna_briga_napomena: Admin verifies medical documentation. Base amount: 2,000 POEN/day.
programi.skolovanje_napomena: Admin sets daily amount. Re-verification every 6 months.
programi.majkama_napomena: Base amount: 2,000 POEN/day per child. Coefficients grow with number of children.
programi.zaposljavnje_opis: You will be enrolled in the Employment program. Each day you submit an activity record for admin approval.
programi.ev_greska_opis: Description must be at least 10 characters.
programi.opis_majkama: 2,000 POEN/day per child · coefficients grow with number of children · 20 years
programi.opis_posebna_briga: 2,000 POEN/day · disability or chronic illness · documentation required
programi.opis_skolovanje: Amount set by admin · re-verification every 6 months
programi.nepun_indeks: A social programme requires a full reality index (100%) — all ten verifications. All your verifiers confirm that the eligibility condition is met before approval.
programi.posebna_briga_datum_isteka: Decision expiry date (optional — leave blank if permanent)
programi.posebna_briga_napomena2: Only the date of the competent authority's decision is recorded — no decision number, authority name, medical documentation, or diagnosis is required.
programi.pristanak_tekst: I consent to my ten verifiers being asked to confirm under full responsibility that I meet the condition for this programme. Verifiers do not see the entered data. The Foundation approves the application only when all confirm.
programi.potvrde_opis: Users you have verified have applied for a social programme and listed you as a verifier. Confirm under full responsibility that the person meets the condition, or explain why you cannot confirm. You do not see the entered application data.
programi.potvrde_prazno: You currently have no confirmation requests.
programi.potvrda_obrazlozenje_obavezno: An explanation is required when rejecting.

glasanje.nema_zrna: Active ZRNO required for voting and creating proposals.
glasanje.period_info: Voting takes place in the next accounting period (midnight–midnight); you do not set the deadline (art. 11).
glasanje.np_greska_naslov: Title must be at least 5 characters.
glasanje.np_greska_opis: Description must be at least 20 characters.
glasanje.registar_opis: Immutable overview of all closed Upper Kolo proposals with their outcome (art. 21).
glasanje.veto_obrazlozenje_placeholder: Veto justification — specific threat to sustainability (art. 18)

donacije.beta_opis: The Foundation's bank account will be opened before the Test phase. All information below is prepared and will be active.
donacije.objasnjenje: Donate dinars to the Foundation via bank transfer and receive POEN according to your donation rank. Higher rank means a better rate — once achieved, the rank is kept.
donacije.napomena_uplata: State purpose "Donation" — admin will match by your name. Amount is at your discretion.
donacije.placanje_uspeh: Payment was received successfully. POEN has been recorded — you can see it in the history below.
donacije.placanje_neuspeh: Payment was not approved (the bank declined the transaction). No payment has been recorded.
donacije.placanje_greska: An error occurred while processing the payment. If you were charged, please contact support.
donacije.karticno_opis: Secure payment on the bank's page (3D Secure). Card data is not stored on the platform.
donacije.vidljivost_javna_opis: Your first and last name will be publicly shown in the donations list. Only a public donation carries POEN.
donacije.vidljivost_anonimna_opis: Your name is not shown. No POEN is recorded for an anonymous donation.
donacije.vidljivost_upozorenje: Note: publicly showing your name next to a donation may link your pseudonym and other records to your identity.
donacije.lista_opis: Public donors are shown by first and last name; anonymous donors are not identified.
donacije.ips_opis: Scan the QR with your mobile banking app — the dinar payment arrives in seconds, with no platform fee. POEN is recorded once the Foundation confirms the incoming payment.
donacije.ips_uskoro: The Foundation's account for IPS payments will be opened soon. This option will activate automatically once the account is configured.
donacije.ips_limit: Maximum per IPS payment: {max} RSD. For larger amounts use a card or a regular bank transfer.
donacije.ips_greska: QR code generation is not possible right now.
donacije.ips_skeniraj_uputstvo: Open your mobile banking app → "Pay / Scan QR" → scan this code. The amount and reference number are pre-filled — just confirm.
donacije.ips_napomena_potvrda: After payment, the Foundation confirms the incoming funds by reference number and POEN is then recorded. The reference number is already in the QR code — do not change it.

zaposljavnje.podnaslov: Active listings for engagement in the system
zaposljavnje.nije_verifikovan: Verification required to apply for listings.
zaposljavnje.nema_oglasa: No active listings at the moment.

poruke.nema_konverzacija:
No conversations.
Search for a user to start.
poruke.izaberite_konverzaciju: Select a conversation or search for a user.
poruke.neverifikovan_info: As an unverified user you may only reply to messages from verified members who contacted you regarding your vouching request.

kakoFunkcionise.uvod: KOLO is a network of Circles that records member contributions and rewards them with the internal unit POEN. It's not a bank, not crypto — it's a mutual aid system.
kakoFunkcionise.k1_opis: Create an account with a pseudonym — your real name stays private. Pseudonym is the only thing the rest of the community sees.
kakoFunkcionise.k2_opis: Upload both sides of your ID card or visit a local Circle for in-person verification. Every person is verified once.
kakoFunkcionise.k3_opis: KOLO Protocol automatically emits 1,000 POEN to your wallet as soon as admin approves verification. That's your starting capital.
kakoFunkcionise.k4_naslov: Trade and contribute to the community
kakoFunkcionise.k4_opis: Use POEN for purchases on the Marketplace, or offer your own services and goods. ZRNO gives you a vote in system governance.
kakoFunkcionise.poen_opis: POEN is a contribution record unit — it records how much you've contributed to the community. It's not money in a legal sense and cannot be exchanged for currency.
kakoFunkcionise.poen_f1_opis: 1 POEN = 1 POEN. No cents or decimals.
kakoFunkcionise.poen_f2_opis: The sum of all POEN in the system is always zero. Protocol emits, you receive.
kakoFunkcionise.poen_f3_opis: Transfer between members is 1:1. Nobody takes a cut.
kakoFunkcionise.poen_f4_opis: POEN doesn't expire. Your contribution is remembered.
kakoFunkcionise.zrno_opis: ZRNO is a governance unit. It is registered to your record in exchange for POEN, and used to vote on community decisions. By locking ZRNO you gain votes proportional to your contribution.
kakoFunkcionise.zrno_kurs_opis: The accounting coefficient — how many POEN it takes for one ZRNO — grows as the recorded POEN in the system increases. This means early members receive more ZRNO for the same POEN.
kakoFunkcionise.ver_opis: Every member is verified once and only once. One person = one account. Verification prevents duplicates and preserves system integrity.
kakoFunkcionise.ver_k1_opis: Photograph both sides of your ID card and upload through the app. Admin reviews and approves.
kakoFunkcionise.ver_k2_opis: Visit a local Circle and show your document in person. Admin enters the ID number directly into the system.
kakoFunkcionise.prog_opis: KOLO Protocol emits POEN exclusively through approved programs. Each day it can emit a maximum of 10% of total circulation.
kakoFunkcionise.prog_ver_opis: Every newly verified account receives a one-time reward of 1,000 POEN.
kakoFunkcionise.prog_don_opis: Every donation to the Foundation raises the POEN/RSD coefficient. Donors receive POEN proportional to their donation.
kakoFunkcionise.prog_por_opis: Programs for mothers, elderly, education and employment. Will be activated in the next development phase.
kakoFunkcionise.krugovi_opis: KOLO operates through a network of local Circles. Each Circle is autonomous and manages its own programs. A Circle member is a verified user who formally joins a Circle and takes on governance responsibility.
kakoFunkcionise.krug_osnivanje_opis: Minimum 5 verified members required. The initiator submits a founding request, Foundation reviews and approves. Founding brings 50,000 POEN starting capital.
kakoFunkcionise.cta_opis: Registration is free. Verification gives you 1,000 POEN bonus.

pravne.meta_uslovi_desc: KOLO Platform Terms of Use, version 3.9.0
pravne.meta_radnje_desc: Register of personal data processing activities, version 3.9.0
pravne.meta_rizici_desc: Risk acceptance statement for participation in the KOLO system, version 3.9.0
pravne.meta_pravilnik_desc: Index of KOLO system rulebooks, version 3.9.0

kolo-sistem.opis: The system's foundational act (12 chapters, 82 articles). Governs POEN, ZRNO, the accounting coefficient, proof of reality, the contribution-recording channels, modules, and governance.

hijerarhija.naziv: Rulebook on the Hierarchy of Acts
hijerarhija.opis: Governs the relationships between the Foundation's general acts and the platform acts, and the procedure for their adoption and amendment.

dokaz-stvarnosti.opis: The operational mechanics of user verification through the vouching chain: the reality index, verification capacity, and the anti-circularity rule.

pokroviteljstvo-donacije.opis: Donation tiers for individuals (11 levels, coefficient 1.00–2.00) and sponsorship tiers for legal entities (7 levels, threshold RSD 10,000).

operativni.opis: The mechanics of the operational programme — publishing tasks and confirming their completion by ZRNO Holders, or by the Foundation's Management Board in the first phase.

osnivacki.opis: Retroactive recording of work performed before the platform launched. Upper limit of 2,400,000 POEN; the channel closes permanently.

gornje-kolo.opis: Voting, delegation, and decision-making in the Upper Kolo; the voting accounting period, quadratic voting power, and the Foundation's protective veto.

programi-podrske.opis: Social programmes (Support for Mothers, for the Elderly, Special Care, Schooling) — conditions, coefficients, and verifier confirmation.

javneKomponente.footer_brand_opis:
KOLO is a participatory common good system.
It records work, goods and knowledge we contribute to each other and the community.
javneKomponente.footer_copyright: © 2026 KOLO Foundation · Sombor, Serbia · Preparatory phase · ekolo.rs

landing.meta_title: KOLO — a mutuality system you build with your community
landing.meta_desc: KOLO is a common-good contribution ledger. POEN records what you give to your community. ZRNO gives you a voice in the decisions that shape the system.
landing.hero_naslov: Let's join forces where we live
landing.hero_podnaslov:
through the exchange of work, goods and knowledge — without intermediaries.
Every contribution is recorded. Yours too.
landing.problem_1_naslov: We don't know what we eat.
landing.problem_1_opis: We buy food that has travelled thousands of kilometres, while someone in our own neighbourhood produces exactly that — honey, eggs, cheese, fruit, vegetables.
landing.problem_1_poenta: What we need grows right next to us, yet never reaches us.
landing.problem_2_opis: Our shopping runs through wholesalers and retail chains that a small producer simply can't break into. They're shut out of those channels, and we're shut inside them.
landing.problem_2_poenta: The demand exists, the supply exists — the channel doesn't.
landing.problem_3_opis: The neighbour is a skilled tradesman, the woman next door makes the best cheese around, their son gives lessons. But only the people closest to them know it.
landing.problem_3_poenta: We need all of it every day — but no one connects it or records it.
landing.alternativa_naslov: KOLO is the answer we build together
landing.alternativa_citat:
“When people were thirsty, they dug a well.
Everyone drank from it, and no one was thirsty any more.
The well was theirs — and it was no one's.
KOLO is such a well.”
landing.alternativa_podnaslov: A network of people who offer each other work, goods and knowledge — without intermediaries.
landing.alternativa_1_opis: A neighbour, a friend, a friend of a friend — people who have something to offer you and to whom you can give something in return. KOLO connects them and makes their contributions visible. What some people have, others need.
landing.alternativa_2_opis_start: Every time you give goods, a service or knowledge to someone in the network — it is recorded. That record is called
landing.alternativa_2_opis_end: — an internal unit of account within the network. It is not money, it can't be exchanged for cash, it doesn't go on any exchange. This is how what you've given becomes visible — and others recognise you more easily when you need something too.
landing.alternativa_3_naslov: The rules are the same for everyone
landing.alternativa_3_opis: The system's rules and the way decisions are made are written down publicly and available to all. Rules are never changed to favour one person — they change only together, by the same procedure for everyone. The community itself manages its shared resources, not someone on the outside.
landing.kome_1_opis: Your home-grown produce goes straight to the people who want it — no middlemen, no commission.
landing.kome_1_poenta: Every bit of your effort is recorded and seen — nothing vanishes into someone else's pocket.
landing.kome_2_opis: People in your area see what you do and can recommend you — based on real experience, with no commission.
landing.kome_2_poenta: Less downtime, more work from people who need it and know good craftsmanship.
landing.kome_3_opis: You can repair, advise, teach — exchange that for home-made goods or services you need, with people known to someone you know.
landing.kome_3_poenta: Your experience becomes visible and sought after.
landing.kome_4_opis: Offer preserves, baked goods and handmade items in your area — and swap them with neighbours for what you need.
landing.kome_4_poenta: Work done at home becomes visible as a contribution to the community.
landing.kome_5_opis: Childcare, sourcing healthy food, everyday help — from people you know or whom someone you trust knows.
landing.kome_5_poenta: You have support to be a parent — because we're all here for one another.
landing.kome_6_opis: First clients, informal work and room to develop your own thing — within a network of people from your area.
landing.kome_6_poenta: Dignity, a reason to stay here, and surroundings you can actually influence.
landing.kome_7_opis: Open source (AGPL-3.0), content under CC BY-SA 4.0. You can check how the system works, propose changes or contribute to development.
landing.kome_7_poenta: A meaningful project you can trust because you can read it.
landing.kome_8_opis: You're already organised, you already have people and structure. KOLO adds a record of exchange and a link to other cooperatives and individuals.
landing.kome_8_poenta: Your members gain access to the whole network, and the cooperative — one more tool for its work.
landing.kome_9_opis: All the value you exchange with others stays within the community.
landing.kome_9_poenta: With every exchange in your neighbourhood you create conditions that are better for everyone.
landing.primer_korak_1_opis: Ana swaps 5 jars of honey with Milan for 4,000 POEN.
landing.primer_korak_2_opis: Ana's washing machine breaks down. Lazar fixes it for 4,000 POEN.
landing.primer_korak_3_opis: Lazar exchanges 500 POEN for homemade bread that Marija bakes in her own kitchen.
landing.primer_korak_4_opis: Marija points him to Stefan, who carves wooden kitchen utensils.
landing.primer_napomena_1: — it's a record of how much each person has contributed to the community.
landing.primer_napomena_2: The honey, the repair and the bread in the example are real; POEN merely records the exchange.
landing.kako_funkcionise_korak_1_opis: Free, in under a minute. You choose a pseudonym instead of your real name and accept the Terms of Use — no documents needed to register. You get access to the public part of KOLO right away, and unlock full access once it's confirmed that you're a real person.
landing.kako_funkcionise_korak_2_opis: A verified user who personally knows you confirms that you are real, based on that acquaintance. This way you become a verified user yourself, with every feature of the system at your disposal. The Protocol then automatically records 1,000 POEN for you and 1,000 POEN for the user who confirmed you — recognition that you are both in the vouching chain.
landing.kako_funkcionise_korak_3_opis: You exchange goods and services, invite people you know, get involved in the community and, if you wish, donate to the Foundation. Every contribution you make stays recorded and visible in POEN.
landing.pijaca_prazno: The system is in its early days — these are the first listings.
landing.statistike_podnaslov: Individual ledger entries are visible to verified platform members.
landing.ko_stoji_opis: Fifteen years spent studying how communities around the world — from Switzerland and Italy to Canada and Japan — exchange work and goods without money.
landing.ko_stoji_opis_2: KOLO is our version of the social and solidarity economy — when people organise themselves to care for one another — which both the United Nations and the European Union have recognised, adapted to Serbian law.
landing.ko_stoji_citat: “Every day in my surgery I see people the system ought to help but can't. Everyone has their place in society and something to contribute. They just need the infrastructure — the tools and a community behind them.”
landing.cta_naslov: Join us — or follow the system as it grows
landing.cta_opis: The first group of members is gathering right now. Registration is free and takes under two minutes.
landing.cta_footer: What benefits you benefits your community too.

oNama.meta_desc: Nikola Šarić, a doctor from Sombor, has spent fifteen years building a system of exchange of labour and goods without intermediaries. The story of KOLO, the Foundation and an invitation to participate.
oNama.hero_opis: A doctor from Sombor who has spent fifteen years building a system of exchange of labour and goods without intermediaries. This is that story and an invitation to build this system together.
oNama.citat_tekst: As a doctor my calling is to help people. I believe the same was true of the system we live in. But every day at work I see people the system should help but cannot — farmers, pensioners, mothers, sick people who still have so much to give. I deeply believe everyone has their place in the community and something to contribute. All they need is infrastructure — a tool and people behind it.
oNama.prica_p1: The first doubts about the system arose during medical school. I saw that the science I was learning was not neutral and that hidden interests were steering the profession towards profit. And that the goal of the system is not health but continuous treatment. The same logic shapes every other system — food production, the economy, the labour market. I completed medicine because I concluded that the system is easier to change from within.
oNama.prica_p2: Alongside medicine, I spent years studying how communities around the world exchange labour and goods without money as an intermediary — so-called complementary economic systems. In March 2014 I was a guest on the show Na rubu znanosti with Krešimir Mišak on HRT, in an episode about local and alternative currencies, and presented ALVA — the project's form at the time. In late June 2016 I spent a week on Pelion in Greece at a workshop called Innovation in Exchange and Finance led by Thomas Greco — author of The End of Money and the Future of Civilization and one of the world's foremost theorists of complementary currencies. The group included, among others, a team from Volos who had been running the Volos TEM for four years — a Greek local exchange network where over 800 people trade food, services and craft products at special markets, recording value instead of paying cash. I organised several public events on this topic — in Stanišić, Sombor, Novi Sad and Belgrade.
oNama.prica_p3: The idea changed name and form over the years — ALVA (2012), Transitional Alternative (2013–14), Alva Foundation (2016–17) — and matured into what KOLO is today. Now, after fifteen years, we have a ready legal framework, a platform and a structure designed to operate increasingly independently of any individual — including the founder.
oNama.status_opis: The system is being built in phases. We are currently in the testing phase — a closed circle of people is verifying the platform under real conditions before we open it to the first users.
oNama.faza1_opis: The platform is built, the full documentation written and the Foundation established — everything ahead of the first opening. (Behind us.)
oNama.faza2_opis: A closed circle of people tests the entire flow under real conditions — registration, verification, POEN, the Marketplace and programmes — before we open the system to the first users.
oNama.faza3_opis: Public registration opens. The goal is to reach enough verified people for exchange and mutuality in the first community to sustain themselves.
oNama.faza4_opis: All modules are running — Krug, Zadruga, social programmes — and collective decision-making through Gornje Kolo is active. The community governs the system itself.
oNama.faza5_opis: Cooperatives are founded in several cities and connected into a network. KOLO is no longer tied to a single place.
oNama.faza6_opis: From a system resting on existing law toward a formally recognised place in the legal framework — through registered cooperatives and clear positioning of the model.
oNama.faza7_opis: Through mutuality, the community itself carries functions that once depended on institutions — social security, health and care, education, food production, mutual financing and collective decision-making. The Foundation is no longer the centre of the system.
oNama.otvaranje_opis: Before we open the system to the public, we test the entire flow in practice with a small, familiar circle of people. The goal is for the first real users to find a system that works reliably and fairly.
oNama.stavka1_tekst: The entire flow a user goes through — registration, verification through the chain of vouching, recording and transfer of POEN, the Marketplace, programmes and donations — is being tested under real conditions.
oNama.stavka2_tekst: We verify that every record holds: the zero-sum balance (the sum of all accounts is always zero), nightly settlements and the recording of contribution. The goal is for the figures to be accurate down to the last POEN.
oNama.stavka3_tekst: We look for bugs and possible ways to abuse the system while the circle is small — so we can fix them before real people use it.
oNama.stavka4_tekst: Data entered during testing has no real value and may be deleted or reset before opening. This phase serves verification, not actual exchange.
oNama.stavka5_tekst: Once the platform is stable and the entire flow runs without errors, the Foundation Board decides to open public registration — that is the next phase, Critical mass. Opening does not depend on the number of POEN; that threshold (Gornje Kolo) comes later.
oNama.stavka6_tekst: KOLO Foundation has been established as a legal entity headquartered in Sombor (Šetalište 16); registration with the Business Registers Agency is under way.
oNama.cilj_tekst: The goal of all these steps is for the Foundation to cease being the centre of the system as soon as possible.
oNama.ukljucivanje_naslov: The system is built through different forms of contribution
oNama.ukljucivanje_opis: Whether you have five minutes, knowledge, resources or connections — there is a way to help.
oNama.istaknut_naslov: Be among the first in your area
oNama.istaknut_tekst: The most important contribution requires neither a company nor special expertise. All it takes is to get involved and invite people you know — neighbours, friends, relatives. Everything in one place starts with a few people who trust each other. If you want KOLO to come alive where you live, start with yourself and the people around you.
oNama.k1_tekst: If you want to know when the system opens — register for early access. The first verified users lay the foundations of the community, and their work in that early phase is specially recognised through the Contribution Recording Programme.
oNama.k2_tekst: If you run a company or have the means to support development, your donation to the Foundation covers the cost of maintaining the platform and running the system. Sponsors are publicly listed, and contribution levels are transparently defined in the Rulebook.
oNama.k3_tekst: If you are a developer, designer or work in another IT field and can help with platform development — get in touch.
oNama.sek1_tekst: Writers, journalists, editors, video producers, designers. Special need: people who can translate complex concepts into plain language for different audiences (farmers, pensioners, young people).
oNama.sek2_tekst: Journalists who would write about the system, editors open to complementary economy topics, academics (economists, lawyers, sociologists, anthropologists). Criticism from within strengthens the system as much as support does.
oNama.sek3_tekst: Experience running businesses, NGOs or larger organisations. The Foundation needs operational management, coordination between the Board and executive functions, and building internal processes.
oNama.sek4_tekst: Lawyers with an interest in cooperative law, foundation law and digital platform issues, as well as accountants with experience in the non-profit sector.
oNama.sek5_tekst: Contacts in cooperatives, producer associations, trade unions, civil society, local governments — all of this accelerates the spread of the system into communities where it makes the most sense.
oNama.sek6_tekst: If you can provide a venue for a talk, presentation or small gathering in your city — Sombor and the surrounding area are first in line, but every city in Serbia and the region is welcome.
oNama.sek7_tekst: If you don't have a company but want to support the system, individuals can be donors too — that contribution is recorded in a special way defined by the Rulebook.
oNama.sek8_tekst: The system is also built through forms of contribution not yet foreseen. If you see a way to help not listed above — get in touch, we will talk.
oNama.stub1_tekst: The Foundation is the legal instrument of the system — a legal entity that receives donations and sponsorships in goods, services and money. It covers the operational costs of the platform, maintains the infrastructure and represents KOLO before the community and the state.
oNama.stub2_tekst: KOLO Foundation was established with its headquarters in Sombor (Šetalište 16). Registration with the Business Registers Agency is under way.
oNama.stub3_tekst: Board of Directors and Director. The Board makes strategic decisions. The Director manages operations. Upon activation of the Upper Kolo, the Foundation transitions to a service and executive role — implementing decisions and providing reasoned responses to Upper Kolo recommendations.
oNama.dok_pravilnik_hijerarhija: Rulebook on the hierarchy of acts
oNama.kontakt_opis: For all enquiries not covered in the FAQ section, you can contact us directly at the address above.
oNama.cta_opis: No ads, no subscription, no hidden deals.
oNama.cta_opis2: There is a system and there is a community of people forming right now.
oNama.cta_eyebrow: Early access · Pre-launch · Foundation in registration
oNama.cta_licence: Software: AGPL-3.0 · Content: CC BY-SA 4.0 · Common good and licences

oSistemu.meta_desc: KOLO records what we contribute to our community — labour, goods and knowledge — and preserves it as a common good, within the framework of the social and solidarity economy.
oSistemu.hero_opis: KOLO records what we contribute to the community — labour, goods and knowledge — and keeps it as a common good.
oSistemu.zajednicko_citat: Grain by grain — a loaf, stone by stone — a palace.
oSistemu.zajednicko_p1: Everything that passes through KOLO — labour, knowledge, goods, time, connections, the infrastructure the Foundation maintains — leaves a trace in the community: it strengthens the network, knowledge and trust that remain available to everyone. It builds it. Makes it more capable of caring for itself.
oSistemu.zajednicko_p2_post: . No one owns it. Everyone participates. The more you give, the more comes back — through recognition and access to the common good.
oSistemu.zajednicko_p3_pre: is the measure of your contribution to the common good and access to what passes through it. Recognition that you brought something — and the basis for using what others have brought.
oSistemu.svg_cuva_ime: that the Foundation holds on behalf of all participants
oSistemu.svg_svi_zajedno: all users together form the KOLO Community
oSistemu.svg_nosioci_odlucuju: ZRNO Holders decide through the Upper Kolo
oSistemu.k1_tekst: A legal entity headquartered in Sombor. Receives donations and sponsorships in dinars, goods and services. Covers operational costs, maintains infrastructure and represents KOLO before the community and the state.
oSistemu.k2_tekst: A software mechanism — part of the common good, open under AGPL-3.0; the Foundation maintains and operates it but does not own it. Records POEN and maintains the ledger according to rules that are predetermined, publicly available and the same for everyone. With every POEN entry, the Protocol records the same amount as a debit to itself — which is why the sum of all accounts always remains zero.
oSistemu.k3_tekst: The governing body of all ZRNO Holders; composition changes with each accounting period. Decides by quadratic voting — voting power equals the integer square root of active ZRNO (holding 100 active ZRNO gives 10 votes), preventing concentration of power.
oSistemu.k4_tekst: The people who make up the KOLO Community — all who accept the rules by which it functions. Through their labour, goods and knowledge they contribute to the common good and receive POEN in return, and through it access to what others have brought. Those who hold ZRNO also participate in decision-making through the Upper Kolo.
oSistemu.topla_voda_tag: We are not reinventing the wheel
oSistemu.topla_voda_citat: The moral test of government is how it treats those who are in the dawn of life — children; those who are in the twilight of life — the elderly; and those who are in the shadows of life — the sick, the needy, and the handicapped.
oSistemu.topla_voda_naslov: A solidarity economy pilot in Serbia
oSistemu.topla_voda_p1: The idea that a community can organise its own exchange — recording contributions and establishing its own unit of account, which is not money but enables exchange in a closed loop — is not new. Documented networks have existed for decades in various countries.
oSistemu.topla_voda_p2_pre: is an internationally recognised field — from cooperatives and foundations to mutual societies — in which organisations work for social purpose, decide democratically and return value to the community. It has been formally recognised by the ILO, the UN General Assembly, the EU Council and Commission, and the OECD.
oSistemu.topla_voda_p3_pre: KOLO enters this stream as an
oSistemu.topla_voda_p3_mid: — a system that does not present itself as a finished product, but as a framework built through participation, learning and revision of rules through democratic procedures. At the same time it is a
oSistemu.topla_voda_p3_post: — a concrete realisation of the international solidarity economy framework in the Serbian legal and social context, adapted to domestic laws and needs.
oSistemu.sistemi_opis: Four networks from different parts of the world. Different countries, different contexts — but the same family of systems. KOLO belongs to that family, with its own distinctive features.
oSistemu.sistemi_wir_opis: The oldest active system of this kind. Founded during the Great Depression as a mutual credit network among businesses — each member starts at zero, debts are settled by selling to other members, and WIR francs cannot be exchanged for Swiss francs. The system survived three major global crises and today operates among tens of thousands of Swiss small and medium enterprises.
oSistemu.sistemi_wir_pokazao: An interest-free mutual credit system can survive ninety years and be countercyclical — when the formal economy weakens, WIR trade grows.
oSistemu.sistemi_lets_opis: In 1983 Michael Linton launched the first Local Exchange Trading System in a small town on Vancouver Island — a local network where members exchange labour, goods and services using their own unit of account, independent of the national currency. A typical LETS network has tens to several hundred members, and the sum of all accounts is always zero. Over forty years the model has spread worldwide.
oSistemu.sistemi_lets_pokazao: A local network with its own unit of account does not need to be technologically advanced to work — and can persist across generations.
oSistemu.sistemi_sardex_opis: Founded in 2010 in response to the debt crisis that hit Sardinia hard. Four young Sardinians, without economics degrees but with a clear understanding of their community's problems, launched a mutual credit network among local businesses. Every member starts at zero, the sum of all accounts is always zero, and there is no interest. The European Commission included them in the DigiPay4Growth programme.
oSistemu.sistemi_sardex_pokazao: A local team, without major investment or direct state support, can build a sustainable network in about a decade — if it has persistence, structure and insight into the real problems of its community.
oSistemu.sistemi_fureai_opis: A Japanese exchange system based on time and care for the elderly. Members who help older people — through home care, accompaniment, cooking — log the hours worked and can use them for themselves or transfer them to a family member elsewhere in the country who cares for their own parent. It grew into hundreds of organisations with around a hundred thousand users across Japan, operating in parallel with the state care system for years.
oSistemu.sistemi_fureai_pokazao: A contribution ledger can become the infrastructure of care for vulnerable groups in society. Recognising care work as economically measurable does not degrade its human character — on the contrary, it makes it visible and transferable.
oSistemu.familija_naslov: The same family, with its own distinctive features
oSistemu.familija_p1_pre: KOLO is not a copy of any of the networks mentioned. Unlike those networks — which are primarily exchange currencies — KOLO separates contribution from vote:
oSistemu.familija_p1_zrno: carries the vote in decisions, with quadratic voting as protection against anyone seizing power. In addition, exchange and its recording are legally separate — so POEN is never payment — and support for vulnerable groups (mothers, the elderly, students) is built into the system itself.
oSistemu.familija_p2: But fundamentally, KOLO belongs to the same family — systems of exchange ledgers among individuals, operating complementarily to the official currency, and working for users rather than exploiting them.
oSistemu.okvir_naslov: The global and European current KOLO enters
oSistemu.okvir_opis: Over the past four years solidarity economy has become a formally recognised sector — both in the UN system and in the EU legal framework.
oSistemu.okvir1_tekst: The first internationally adopted definition of solidarity economy — consensus of governments, employers and workers from 187 countries. Its four principles: voluntary cooperation, democratic governance, autonomy and primacy of people over capital.
oSistemu.okvir2_tekst: The first UN resolution on solidarity economy in history; calls on states to develop legal frameworks for it.
oSistemu.okvir3_tekst: EU framework to 2030, with over sixty actions. Names digital platform cooperatives and technology for the common good (tech for good) as recognised models.
oSistemu.okvir4_tekst: Elaboration of the Action Plan; calls on states to adopt national strategies. Among priorities names local short food chains — the direction KOLO is moving in.
oSistemu.pristup_tekst_pre: Serbia is joining the EU, so the Union's direction becomes Serbia's direction too — formally through
oSistemu.pristup_tekst_post: , but above all through concrete projects moving in the same direction without waiting for directives. KOLO is one of them.
oSistemu.zasto_p1: Solidarity economy is now a formally recognised sector, and Serbia is in the process of acceding to the European Union.
oSistemu.zasto_p2_post: is ideal for a pilot project. The Vojvodina Bačka region has one of the longest cooperative traditions in the world — the third cooperative ever founded was established in 1846 in Bački Petrovac, just two years after the first in England. Agricultural cooperatives, the farmstead economy — this is a living memory that elderly people in villages around Sombor recall firsthand. KOLO activates a form of organisation that is historically normal in this part of the world.
oSistemu.zasto_p3: Sombor is large enough for network effects to be measurable, and small enough to be visible without statistical noise. The urban core surrounded by farmsteads and villages means a pilot can in one sweep include a craftsman, a pensioner, a homemaker, a young mother and a farmer — all the user types the system must serve. If a solidarity economic system has anything to offer, it must first offer it to a place like Sombor.
oSistemu.margaret_citat: Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it's the only thing that ever has.
oSistemu.cta_opis: Now that you know where the system comes from,
oSistemu.cta_opis2: see how it works and who stands behind it.
oSistemu.cta_licence: Software: AGPL-3.0 · Content: CC BY-SA 4.0 · Common good and licences

kakoFunkcionisePage.meta_title: How KOLO works — detailed system rules
kakoFunkcionisePage.meta_desc: KOLO is a social network for economic exchange. Become a member, six ways to record POEN, system architecture, legal nature of transactions and everything you need to know.
kakoFunkcionisePage.k1_opis: Email, pseudonym and password — that's all it takes. Throughout the interface you are represented solely by your pseudonym, your real name is not required, and the system does not even keep a record linking your pseudonym to your identity. Registration takes about a minute, is free and commits you to nothing.
kakoFunkcionisePage.k2_opis: Right after registering you can see the public exchange ledger and browse every marketplace listing — content, price and location. You can already exchange goods and services with others and transfer POEN as giver or recipient, and through the guarantee board introduce yourself to the network to find someone to vouch for you. Posting listings, contacting advertisers and earning POEN through contribution come only with verification.
kakoFunkcionisePage.k3_opis: A verified user who personally knows you confirms that you are a real person. KOLO achieves this technically, without collecting any document. Each confirmation further establishes you as a real network member — and the Protocol records 1,000 POEN for each.
kakoFunkcionisePage.k4_opis: Full network access: post marketplace listings, exchange with other users, contribute to the system and apply for Social programmes. Once verified yourself, you can also introduce and confirm people you personally know.
kakoFunkcionisePage.k5_opis: ZRNO gives you voting rights in the Upper Kolo — the body that decides on the rules that apply to everyone. Votes are counted by square root, so no one with a lot of ZRNO can outvote the community alone.
kakoFunkcionisePage.evidencija_naslov: Six channels through which the Protocol records POEN
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_ne_kupuje: POEN cannot be bought with money.
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_kanali: It is recorded exclusively through six contribution channels — the Protocol records them automatically, identically for everyone, without exception.
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_preraspodela: When you exchange with someone, POEN simply moves from one party to another: existing records are redistributed, nothing new is created.
kakoFunkcionisePage.n1_opis: When a verified user who personally knows you confirms you in the vouching chain, the Protocol automatically records 1,000 POEN to you and 1,000 POEN to the verifier — and, when the verification is subject to supervision, 500 POEN to the supervisor. Joining the system is simultaneously a contribution to it.
kakoFunkcionisePage.n2_opis: You donate money to the Foundation. The Protocol records POEN according to a coefficient that grows gently with your total contribution. POEN from a donation does not confer ownership, cannot be converted to money and does not buy votes.
kakoFunkcionisePage.n3_opis: A legal entity (company, association) signs a donation agreement with the Foundation in money, goods or services. The sponsor does not receive POEN; the verified-user owner receives a bonus according to a fixed 7-tier table.
kakoFunkcionisePage.n4_opis: Concrete work for the community: ZRNO Holders (and in the first phase the Foundation Board) post a task, you apply and complete it, they confirm completion before the Protocol records POEN.
kakoFunkcionisePage.n5_opis: Recognition for work invested before the system even existed — limited both in amount and pace. Recorded in steps of 20,000 POEN, at most one per every 100,000 POEN in the system, so it cannot be accelerated. The channel permanently closes when the founding contribution reaches the ceiling of 2,400,000 POEN.
kakoFunkcionisePage.n6_opis: Programmes are in place for mothers and primary carers, the elderly, special care and education, in which approved users receive POEN every day.
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_jeste1: A record of contribution to the common good
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_jeste2: Does not expire — your contribution is remembered permanently
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_nije_uvod: In short: POEN is not money and cannot be traded. Below are the legal reasons why.
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_nije4: Financial instrument or investment scheme (Capital Markets Act)
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_nije6: A claim against the Foundation or a property right of the user
kakoFunkcionisePage.poen_nije7: Has no bearer — exists solely as a record in the ledger
kakoFunkcionisePage.zerosum_tekst: The sum of all POEN in the system — all users and the Protocol — is always exactly zero. The Protocol goes into deficit every time it emits. No one can create POEN out of thin air.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_upis1: ZRNO is registered to your record in exchange for POEN; it cannot be transferred between users.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_upis2: The total quantity of ZRNO is fixed — 1,000,000.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_upis3: The accounting coefficient grows as POEN circulation increases.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_upis4: ZRNO records your position in the system.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_koristi1: Free ZRNO can be deregistered to the Protocol at the current accounting coefficient.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_koristi2: Active ZRNO gives a vote in the Upper Kolo, but cannot be deregistered while active.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_koristi3: Number of votes = square root of active ZRNO (√100 ZRNO = 10 votes, not 100).
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_koristi4: You can delegate votes (not ZRNO) to another ZRNO Holder.
kakoFunkcionisePage.zrno_koristi5: ZRNO is not spent by voting.
kakoFunkcionisePage.koeficijent_naslov: The accounting coefficient is not an exchange rate
kakoFunkcionisePage.koeficijent_tekst: The accounting coefficient is an administrative figure — the ratio of recorded POEN to available ZRNO. It is not a price, not a market rate and does not express the value of ZRNO outside the system. The square root in voting means no one with a lot of ZRNO can simply outvote others — the system rewards broader participation, not accumulation.
kakoFunkcionisePage.cta_opis: The rules are clear. Registration is free. The public ledger and marketplace listings are available without registration.
kakoFunkcionisePage.cta_licence: Software: AGPL-3.0 · Content: CC BY-SA 4.0 · Common good and licences

pokroviteljPage.meta_desc: KOLO community sponsors — legal entities and entrepreneurs who support the system by contributing to the Foundation (money, goods or services). View active sponsors and their tiers.
pokroviteljPage.opis: Sponsors are legal entities and organisations that support the KOLO community through sponsorships and donations.
pokroviteljPage.prazno_opis: Be the first to support the KOLO project.
pokroviteljPage.postani_opis: If you represent a legal entity or are a sole trader and wish to support the KOLO community, get in touch with the administrators.

zajednickoDobroPage.meta_desc: KOLO system common good — software under AGPL-3.0 and content under CC BY-SA 4.0. A collective good belonging to all users over which no one holds a property right.
zajednickoDobroPage.opis: The common good of the KOLO system comprises the system software, the system rules, the contribution and participation ledger, and content created within the system.
zajednickoDobroPage.softver_tekst: The system source code is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License, version 3.0 (AGPL-3.0-only).
zajednickoDobroPage.sadrzaj_tekst: Content created within the system is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0).
zajednickoDobroPage.doprinosi_tekst: Software contributions are accepted under the DCO (Developer Certificate of Origin). Every commit must be signed (Signed-off-by).
zajednickoDobroPage.principi_1_opis: POEN cannot be exchanged for money or transferred, and confers no property right.
zajednickoDobroPage.principi_2_opis: The system collects only necessary data. Identity and pseudonym are not linked in the registry.
zajednickoDobroPage.principi_3_opis: The AGPL-3.0 and CC BY-SA 4.0 licences cannot be replaced with more restrictive ones — not even by a decision of the Upper Kolo.

osnivackiDoprinosPage.meta_desc: KOLO founding contribution — retrospective recording of preparatory work on the platform. Track channel status, completed steps and POEN distribution among founders.
osnivackiDoprinosPage.opis: The founding contribution is the retrospective recording of work carried out on the design and preparation of the KOLO system before the platform opened.
osnivackiDoprinosPage.registar_blokiran: The founders register with pseudonyms and shares is available to verified members.
osnivackiDoprinosPage.registar_prazan: The founders register has not yet been published.

cestoPage.meta_desc: Answers to the most common questions about the KOLO system — POEN, ZRNO, verification, Protocol, Foundation and the marketplace.
cestoPage.opis: Answers to the most common questions about the KOLO system. Click on a question to expand the answer, or search by keyword.

pijaca.opis: A place where members offer and seek goods and services. Anyone can browse listings; posting a listing or contacting a seller requires verification.
pijaca.zatrazi_verifikaciju_oglas: Request verification to post a listing
pijaca.nema_oglasa_opis: Be the first to post on the Marketplace!
pijaca.bice_prebaceno: will be transferred to the seller
pijaca.gost_tekst: Browse what the KOLO community has to offer. Verification is required to purchase.
pijaca.meta_desc: Browse listings in the KOLO community: goods, services and crafts. Browsing is public; posting a listing and contacting sellers require verification.
pijaca.podeli_instagram_info: Link copied — paste it into your Instagram story, message or profile.
pijaca.zatrazi_verifikaciju_kupovina_tekst: to be able to contact the seller.
pijaca.nedovoljno_poen: Insufficient POEN. You have {stanje} POEN, {cena} required.
pijaca.slike_hint: Click × to remove an image. Green border = new image (not yet saved).
pijaca.naslov_greska: Title must be at least 3 characters.
pijaca.cena_greska: Price must be a positive number.
pijaca.cena_dogovor_hint: No amount — you agree on the price in chat with the buyer.
pijaca.uspeh_naslov: Your listing has been posted successfully
pijaca.nema_potraznja_opis: Be the first to request a service or build!
pijaca.tip_nudim_hint: You are offering a good or service to others.
pijaca.tip_trazim_hint: You are looking for someone to do or make something. The budget is agreed in messages.
pijaca.naslov_placeholder_potraznja: e.g. Looking for a carpenter to build a shelf

pocetna.opis_stranice: Your starting point: Foundation news and community conversation. See what's new and what others are writing (writing is unlocked after verification).
pocetna.chat_nema_poruka: No messages yet. Be the first to write.
pocetna.chat_samo_verif: Writing in the chat room is available to verified members only.

postaniPokrovitelj.opis: A sponsor is a legal entity or entrepreneur who donates to the Foundation. As the owner of a sponsor, you receive POEN bonuses each time a new level is reached.
postaniPokrovitelj.verifikacija_opis: To be able to own a sponsor, you need to verify your account.
postaniPokrovitelj.nivoi_napomena: The cumulative contribution adds up money, goods, and services. A bonus is recorded for each newly reached level.
postaniPokrovitelj.ranglista_prazno: No sponsors have been registered yet.
postaniPokrovitelj.forma_opis: Submit an application on behalf of a legal entity or entrepreneur. The platform generates a donation agreement for you to sign; once the Foundation confirms receipt, the bonus POEN is recorded.
postaniPokrovitelj.forma_naziv_label: Name of legal entity or entrepreneur
postaniPokrovitelj.forma_cenovnik_napomena: Required for goods and services — used to determine the RSD value.
postaniPokrovitelj.forma_cenovnik_prevelik: The price list is too large (max. ~3MB).
postaniPokrovitelj.forma_cenovnik_obavezan: For goods and services, please attach a retail price list.
postaniPokrovitelj.potpis_potvrda: Sign the donation agreement on behalf of the legal entity or entrepreneur?

doprinosOglasi.opis: Tasks for the common good. The proposed POEN is a weighting factor — the actual recorded POEN is calculated at the end of the accounting period proportional to the daily limit.
doprinosOglasi.neVerifikovanInfo: Applying for tasks requires verification (reality index ≥ 10%). Browsing tasks is available to everyone.
doprinosOglasi.nema_zadataka: There are currently no published tasks.
doprinosOglasi.prijava_primljena_izvršilac: Application accepted — you are now a contributor.
doprinosOglasi.formula_napomena: The proposed POEN is not a guaranteed amount. Recorded POEN = proposed × min(1, L/P), where L is the daily limit (10% of circulation) and P is the sum of proposed POEN of all confirmed completions in the period (art. 22–24).
doprinosOglasi.status_primljen_izvršilac: You have been accepted as a contributor. You may record daily completions.
doprinosOglasi.status_prijava_ceka: Your application has been submitted and is awaiting plan approval from a verifier.
doprinosOglasi.potreban_indeks: Applying requires a reality index of at least 10%.
doprinosOglasi.plan_placeholder: How do you plan to complete this task (min. 10 characters)...
doprinosOglasi.plan_min10: A completion plan is required for this task (min. 10 characters).
doprinosOglasi.prijava_podneta_ceka: Application submitted — awaiting plan approval from a verifier.
doprinosOglasi.ev_greska_poen_pozitivan: Proposed POEN must be a positive whole number.
doprinosOglasi.ev_greska_poen_max: Proposed POEN for a daily completion cannot exceed {max}.
doprinosOglasi.ev_greska_opis_min10: Description must be at least 10 characters.
doprinosOglasi.ev_uspeh: Daily completion submitted. A verifier (ZRNO Holder / Board) will confirm it.

nadzor.page_opis: Verifications awaiting confirmation. Once oversight is confirmed, the verifier gets their slot back and you receive 500 POEN (art. 7, 10–11).
nadzor.nema_ovlascenja_opis: Oversight is performed only by Foundation board members and ZRNO holders (art. 10 of the Proof of Reality Rulebook).

tablaJemstva.page_opis: Unverified users introduce themselves to the network here in order to establish the contact needed for verification — which is always based on personal acquaintance between the verifier and the person being verified (vouching chain).
tablaJemstva.placeholder_predstavljanje: Where you are from and why you want to join.
tablaJemstva.uslovi_objave: To publish you need: an introduction (at least 10 characters), contact details, and consent.
tablaJemstva.placeholder_kontakt: E.g. phone, email or another channel of your choice.
tablaJemstva.napomena_predstavljanje_tekst: is visible to all logged-in users.
tablaJemstva.napomena_kontakt_tekst: are visible only to verified users, and only once they explicitly click "Show contact" — every disclosure is logged.
tablaJemstva.pristanak_tekst: I agree to the posting terms stated above. The request is automatically removed after 30 days.
tablaJemstva.nema_zahteva: There are currently no active requests.
tablaJemstva.prompt_razlog_uklanjanja: Reason for removal (the user will see this):
tablaJemstva.label_razlog_uklanjanja: Reason for removal (the user will see this):
tablaJemstva.placeholder_razlog_uklanjanja: E.g. inappropriate content, false data, or outside the board's purpose.
tablaJemstva.objava_uvod: Introduce yourself to the verified network — someone who knows you can verify you directly from here.
tablaJemstva.oznaka_opis: Optional. A private label to help you track who you verified — visible only to you and the Foundation.
tablaJemstva.potvrda_poznavanja: I confirm that I personally know this person and vouch, on my own responsibility, for their reality, uniqueness and continuity (Art. 5 of the Proof of Reality Rulebook).
tablaJemstva.verifikacija_uspeh: You verified "{pseudonim}". They received full access (index +10%).

dobrodosli.ekran1_naslov: Welcome to the KOLO system test version
dobrodosli.ekran1_p1: We're glad you're here. KOLO is a community where people exchange goods, services and help — without money.
dobrodosli.ekran1_p2: You don't earn money here — instead you get what you need through exchange and the help of people from your area, rather than paying for everything. Give something, get something, and help the community grow.
dobrodosli.ekran1_p3: There's no membership fee and you invest nothing. We'll walk you through the basics — you can reopen this guide anytime from the “?” at the top.
dobrodosli.ekran2_p1: In KOLO, what one person gives — another receives. You offer something you can do or have, and from others you get what you need.
dobrodosli.ekran2_p2: Every such exchange is recorded in POEN — a trace of what you contributed and exchanged.
dobrodosli.ekran2_p3: To take part, the network first needs to recognize you as a real person. More on that next.
dobrodosli.ekran3_p1: POEN is a record of your contribution — it tracks what you gave and what you got in the network.
dobrodosli.ekran3_p2: POEN circulates: when you give someone a good or service — you get POEN; when you need something — you give POEN. That's how the network remembers who contributed how much.
dobrodosli.ekran3_p3: For example: you fix a neighbor's tap — they record it for you in POEN; later you spend that POEN on honey or help you need.
dobrodosli.ekran3_p4: POEN is not money: it can't be bought, can't be exchanged for currency and has no value outside the system. You don't need to pay anything to take part.
dobrodosli.ekran4_p1: To get full access, someone already in the system who knows you personally needs to confirm you. We call that circle of trust the vouching chain — and it requires no documents.
dobrodosli.ekran4_p2: Do you know someone in KOLO? Open Verification, show them your code (you get it on that page) and they'll confirm you in seconds.
dobrodosli.ekran4_p3: Don't know anyone? Introduce yourself to the network on the guarantee board — someone there can meet you and confirm you. Verification also gives you 1,000 POEN as a welcome.
dobrodosli.ekran5_p1: On the marketplace people offer and look for goods and services. Browsing listings is open to everyone — feel free to look around.
dobrodosli.ekran5_p2: When you find something, you arrange it between yourselves and record the exchange in POEN — with no commission and no middlemen.
dobrodosli.ekran5_p3: Posting listings, contacting sellers and messaging unlock once you're verified.
dobrodosli.ekran6_naslov: How you get POEN right now
dobrodosli.ekran6_p1: For now, you get POEN in two ways:
dobrodosli.ekran6_p2: Through verification — when you join the vouching chain you get 1,000 POEN as a welcome, and later you confirm others you personally know.
dobrodosli.ekran6_p3: Through exchange — when you give someone a good or service, they record it for you in POEN.
dobrodosli.ekran7_p1: While you wait for someone to confirm you, feel free to browse the marketplace and follow the latest Foundation news on the home page — announcements, changes and everything important for the community.
dobrodosli.ekran7_p2: Got a question? Just ask in the shared chat — the community is there and happy to help.
dobrodosli.ekran7_p3: Ready? Your first step is verification:
dobrodosli.cta_ne_poznajem: I don't know anyone → Guarantee board

politikaPrihvati.opis: Please read and accept the new version of the Privacy Policy to continue using the platform.

admin.ped_potvrdjeno_msg: Confirmed ({poen} proposed POEN). Issuance at end of accounting period.
admin.novi_oglas_naslov_forme: New task for the common good
admin.novi_oglas_opis_placeholder: Task description, criteria for determining completion...
admin.novi_oglas_obrazlozenje_placeholder: Estimated scope of work and nature of the task...
admin.novi_oglas_sa_odobravanjem_label: Task 'with approval' — application accepted only after verifier approves execution plan (Art. 14)
admin.novi_oglas_poen_validacija: Proposed POEN must be a whole number ≥ 100.
admin.novi_oglas_napomena_box: Proposed POEN ({poen}) is a weighting coefficient. Actual recorded POEN depends on the daily limit distribution (× min(1, L/P)) at end of accounting period.
admin.emisija_pragovi_sub: Bonus is recorded once, when cumulative total crosses a threshold
admin.emisija_prag_nedostignut: Threshold not reached — no POEN recorded
admin.korisnici_iskljuci_confirm: Permanently remove user from the system?
admin.korisnici_lazni_confirm:
Mark as fake verifier?

All verifications in their subtree will be recursively cancelled, issued POEN (1,000/1,000/500) returned to Protocol (possible negative balance), and the user removed. Affected users drop to 0% index.
admin.korisnici_superadmin_confirm: Grant SUPERADMIN? Gets all controls, including dangerous and system-level actions.
admin.pokrovitelji_obavezna_polja: Name, PIB and owner are required.
admin.vesti_sadrzaj_placeholder: Post content (plain text, new line = new paragraph)
admin.nadzor_opis: The system only observes and flags — no action is automatic. Shutdown is a human decision.
admin.nadzor_nema: No open findings. (Cron runs nightly — list is empty until it runs for the first time.)
admin.nadzor_oznaci_cisto_confirm: Mark this finding as clean (false alarm)? It will be removed from the list.
admin.osnivaci_evidentiraj_napomena: Recording is otherwise automatic (nightly issuance). This button is for manual triggering.
admin.osnivaci_evidentiraj_confirm: Run check and record founder contribution steps now?
admin.osnivaci_kanal_zakljucan: Channel is activated (steps > 0) — founder circle is locked and cannot be changed (Art. 3).
admin.pokr_prijave_potvrdi_confirm: Confirm receipt of contribution? Bonus POEN will be issued according to levels.
